visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
All visa applicants for Malta are advised to visit the Joint Visa application centre in Qatar to submit their applications, together with all necessary documents. For all children below 18 years, both parents need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the application form in front of the officer, who will be accepting their application. Please be informed that visas are issued only to citizens and residents of the country they are residing in. 
Please note that the Consulate General of Malta in Qatar issues visas only for residents in its territory of operation 
It is advisable to prepare all your required documents corresponding to your travel dates, to avoid delay in the application process.
Short stay Visa categories
- Business Visa
- Tourist Visa
- Visiting family and friends in Malta
- Study Visa
visa_types.full_text:

Please be informed that visas are issued only to citizens and residents of the country they are residing in. 
Please note that the Consulate General of Malta in Qatar issues visas only for residents in its territory of operation 
It is advisable to prepare all your required documents corresponding to your travel dates, to avoid delay in the application process.
Short stay Visa categories
- Business Visa
- Tourist Visa
- Visiting family and friends in Malta
- Study Visa

visa_types.name: Tourist Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance).
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the checklist.
Tourist Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5FOumaJWykEBRxLv8kmFDp/b1dd2b47711546993ee91a16f3388d66/Tourist-Visa-Checklist-2025.pdf)
EU Spouse/Relative (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3DxsswilTdKpi1TPF8XCoC/76b7769577619d5847d933c17671908d/EU-Spouse-Relatives-Visa-checklist.pdf)
Child NOC (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dMYVdA1buHC5nU4vxBU4B/90b1930cc12cbf119e3e15809b9771a1/Child-consent-form.pdf)
Any of the parents who signed the child NOC form can sign the application form alone.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Tourist Visa]

Please Note: There is a service charge of 147 QAR per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash / Card)
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee is non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
The Consulate General of Malta aims to process the applications is average of 15 working days for all nationalities and it can be more or less depending on embassy decision. In exceptional cases, this period may be extended, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed and when additional documentation is needed in specific cases.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.

Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/tLzLFTKPFWvE6yvWxMj28/fdc74de24a150429a7f1b9eb9e465793/c_visa_application_form.pdf)
Declaration of Proof
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A tourist visa allows you to stay for a short period in the Schengen area (not more than 90 days per 6 months)
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Consulate General responsible for the issuance of the visa will be:
- The Consulate General of the country in which the traveller is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveller is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Consulate General of the country of first entry.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A tourist visa allows you to stay for a short period in the Schengen area (not more than 90 days per 6 months)
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Consulate General responsible for the issuance of the visa will be:
- The Consulate General of the country in which the traveller is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveller is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Consulate General of the country of first entry.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience

## VISA FEES

[Table:   Tourist Visa]

Please Note: There is a service charge of 147 QAR per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash / Card)
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee is non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance).
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the checklist.
Tourist Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5FOumaJWykEBRxLv8kmFDp/b1dd2b47711546993ee91a16f3388d66/Tourist-Visa-Checklist-2025.pdf)
EU Spouse/Relative (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3DxsswilTdKpi1TPF8XCoC/76b7769577619d5847d933c17671908d/EU-Spouse-Relatives-Visa-checklist.pdf)
Child NOC (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dMYVdA1buHC5nU4vxBU4B/90b1930cc12cbf119e3e15809b9771a1/Child-consent-form.pdf)
Any of the parents who signed the child NOC form can sign the application form alone.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants are requested to submit their application form with the new photo format, as explained below: 
General
The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use plain light-White background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old.
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly.
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Photo Size
 The photo for each visa applicant must measure:
- The picture dimensions must be 240 pixels wide by 320 pixels high at least. A smaller picture will be rejected. For instance, a photo being 235 pixels by 320 pixels is not valid.
- On the other hand, the photo should keep a proportion of 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm (width x height) within limits. However, 250 x 340 pixels picture would be valid, but not a 290 x 340 pixels
																			one.
- Finally, the image weight (size in Kbytes) can never be bigger than 120 Kbytes.
Resolution
- An image resolution is measured in DPI (dots per inch) and it's mainly used to control printing quality. Therefore, higher resolution means better printing quality.
- Photos resolution should be 300 dpi, so, when you scan the image, check this parameter carefully. However, bear in mind that the higher the resolution, the bigger the picture.
Resolution
- The only image format accepted is JPEG (Join Photograph Expert Group Format). The other image formats such as BMP, TIFF, GIF, PNG, etc. will be rejected (a warning will be shown).
 Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph to the application form in the designated space.
Note : If children are traveling with their parents and are included inside the passport of the mother and/or the father, one photograph for each children MUST be glued
																		to the application form of the father or the mother, depending on whom are they traveling with.
 Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete. 

## Processing Time
The Consulate General of Malta aims to process the applications is average of 15 working days for all nationalities and it can be more or less depending on embassy decision. In exceptional cases, this period may be extended, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed and when additional documentation is needed in specific cases.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.

## Download Forms
The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/tLzLFTKPFWvE6yvWxMj28/fdc74de24a150429a7f1b9eb9e465793/c_visa_application_form.pdf)
Declaration of Proof

visa_types.overview:
Overview
For people travelling for business purposes (short stay, not more than 90 days per 6 months), such as business meetings, conferences and events.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Consulate General responsible for the issuance of the visa will be:
- The Consulate General of the country in which the traveller is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveller is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Consulate General of the country of first entry.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience
